component_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA must use #FF8A00 text-white. Secondary/Outline uses #0F2D5C. Always rounded-full for modern app feel. Include hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform.
component_instructions.cards: Service cards must have white bg, rounded-2xl, subtle shadow. Image on top, info below. Partner dashboard uses BENTO grid. Do not overuse standard borders.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn UI base. rounded-xl, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF8A00]/20 focus:border-[#FF8A00].
component_instructions.navigation: Customer/Partner on mobile: Fixed Bottom Tab Nav (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-200). Desktop: Sticky Top Nav.
component_instructions.status_badges: Use soft colored backgrounds with bold text (e.g. bg-orange-100 text-orange-700). rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold.
component_instructions.map: Leaflet/OSM implementation. Use custom SVG marker in #FF8A00 for partner location.

testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements and key text MUST have a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid='book-service-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React JS (.js files, NOT .tsx), Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Ensure 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts are imported from Google Fonts in index.css.
Start with the Splash Screen showing the Logo (Navy Blue) and Tagline 'Har Kaam, Ab Hoga Aasaan!' fading in.
Customer flow must be highly polished: Mobile-first layout, carousel for banners, grid for categories, multi-step booking using framer-motion for smooth transitions.
Partner flow focuses on utility: bento grid dashboard, clear wallet balances, document upload forms for onboarding.
Admin flow focuses on density: data tables (Shadcn), stat cards, verification queues.
Use framer-motion for micro-interactions (hover, active states) and page transitions.
Apply `data-testid` universally across all interactive elements.
